creator: brooks@FreeBSD.org
text: For now, the only way is to mark such programs broken on 9.  It should theoretically be possible to build a working c++11 environment on 9, but for now there isn't on in ports.  The 9 series has less than 8 months of support left and I expect to see considerable attrition of ports support over that time as C++11 becomes more common.
